title: camissonia claviformis subsp. lancifolia
intro: Camissonia claviformis subsp. lancifolia, also known as the Siskiyou claviform evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound care and skin issues. The health benefits of Camissonia claviformis subsp. lancifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and harnessed for various health benefits.
